title: Minecart Improvements
description: This datapack enables the minecart experimental changes added in 1.21.2.
body:
I find it useful for people that want to add the experimental changes to their already existing worlds and easier than to modify the nbt data of those.

If you want to add it to an already exesting world, just add the datapack and remove the "level.dat" file in the folder of your world.
